ai_tips: Starting out at 2m — 4.33km ahead with 3m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔2米出发——全程4.33公里，累计爬升3米。
0.38km in — pace 4:49/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.38公里——配速4:49/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 2.22km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 3m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到2.22公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅3米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 5m at 1.23km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点5米，位于1.23公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -3.5% at 1.33km — you let it flow at 5:40/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：1.33公里处坡度-3.5%——你顺势加速到5:40/公里，下坡信心不错。
4.00km — late-run check: pace 5:03/km, still holding form well. 4.00公里——后程检查：配速5:03/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 4.33km in 25:43 (avg 5:57/km, +3m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.33公里，用时25:43（平均配速5:57/公里，爬升3米）。全程稳定扎实。
